_comment: Per-mission 'do not kill X' bonus-objective protected unit-type list. Keyed by Lua mission.ID (the mission template name, e.g. 'Mission_Volatile'). Each value is a list of pawn-type substrings; the evaluator's volatile-kill penalty fires only for kills whose unit.type_name contains one of these strings. Empty lists / missions not present here = no protection on that mission, no penalty. Add entries here as new 'do not kill' missions are catalogued. The matching is substring-based to mirror is_volatile_vek() (so 'Volatile_Vek' covers Volatile_Vek1/2 if those ever appear).
_note: Mission_Volatile is the live Detritus/Archive 'Do not kill the Volatile Vek' objective. Mission_VolatileMine is retained for older guesses/captures.
